description: maritime land force service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Marine Corps (USMC), also referred to as the United States Marines or simply the Marines, is the naval infantry service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: national cemetery in Virginia, United States
description_wiki: Arlington National Cemetery is the largest cemetery in the United States National Cemetery System, one of two maintained by the United States Army.

description: American baseball player and coach (1913–1993)
description_wiki: John Robert Mize (January 7, 1913 – June 2, 1993), nicknamed "Big Jawn" and "the Big Cat", was an American professional baseball first baseman.

description: census-designated place in Beaufort County, South Carolina, United States
seat of San Diego County, California, United States; second-largest city in California
description_wiki: San Diego (  SAN dee-AY-goh; Spanish: [san ˈdjeɣo]) is a city on the Pacific coast of Southern California, adjacent to the Mexico–United States border.

description: global war originating in Europe, 1914–1918
description_wiki: World War I, or the First World War (28 July 1914 – 11 November 1918), also known as The Great War, was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies (or Entente) and the Central Powers.

aliases: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
description: island country in north-west Europe
description_wiki: The United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, commonly known as the United Kingdom (UK) or Britain, is a country in northwestern Europe, off the coast of the continental mainland.

description: maritime land force service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Marine Corps (USMC), also referred to as the United States Marines or simply the Marines, is the naval infantry service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description_wiki: The United States Marine Corps (USMC), also referred to as the United States Marines or simply the Marines, is the naval infantry service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

surface_forms: Barbary pirates started taking our trade merchants
description: 1801–1815 series of wars
description_wiki: The Barbary Wars were a series of two wars fought by the United States, Sweden, and the Kingdom of Sicily against the Barbary states (including Tunis, Algiers, and Tripoli) and Morocco of North Africa in the early 19th century.

description: president of the United States from 1801 to 1809 (1743–1826)
description_wiki: Thomas Jefferson (April 13 [O.S. April 2], 1743 – July 4, 1826) was an American Founding Father and the third president of the United States from 1801 to 1809.

description: title of the Ruler of Ottoman Tripolitania
description_wiki: Pasha of Tripoli was a title that was held by many rulers of Tripoli in Ottoman Tripolitania.

description: American soldier and diplomat (1764-1811)
description_wiki: William Eaton (23 February 1764 – 1 June 1811) was a United States Army officer and the diplomatic officer Consul General to Tunis (1797–1803).

description: German field marshal (1891-1944)
description_wiki: Johannes Erwin Eugen Rommel (pronounced [ˈɛɐviːn ˈʁɔməl] ; 15 November 1891 – 14 October 1944), known as The Desert Fox (German: Wüstenfuchs, pronounced [ˈvyːstn̩ˌfʊks] ), was a German Generalfeldmarschall (field marshal) during World War II. He served in the Wehrmacht of Nazi Germany, as well as in the Reichswehr of the Weimar Republic, and Imperial German Army of the German Empire.

description: country in Southeast Europe
description_wiki: Greece, officially the Hellenic Republic, is a country in Southeast Europe.

description: dictator of Germany from 1933 to 1945, main instigator of World War II (1889–1945)
description_wiki: Adolf Hitler (20 April 1889 – 30 April 1945) was an Austrian-born  German politician who was the dictator of Germany during the Nazi era from 1933 until his suicide in 1945.

description: capital and largest city of Mexico
description_wiki:
Mexico City 
is the capital and largest city of Mexico, as well as the most populous city in North America.

description: former Mesoamerican empire
description_wiki: The Aztec Empire, also known as the Triple Alliance (Classical Nahuatl: Ēxcān Tlahtōlōyān, [ˈjéːʃkaːn̥ t͡ɬaʔtoːˈlóːjaːn̥]) or historiographically as the Tenochca Empire, was an alliance of three Nahua city-states: Mexico-Tenochtitlan, Tetzcoco, and Tlacopan.

description: 9th tlatoani of Tenochtitlan and ruler of the Aztec Triple Alliance (1466-1520)
